You have received this mail because your e-mail ID is registered with Naukri.com. This is a system-generated e-mail regarding your Naukri account preferences, please don't reply to this message. The jobs sent in this mail have been posted by the clients of Naukri.com. And we have enabled auto-login for your convenience, you are strongly advised not to forward this email to protect your account from unauthorized access. IEIL has taken all reasonable steps to ensure that the information in this mailer is authentic. Users are advised to research bonafides of advertisers independently. Please do not pay any money to anyone who promises to find you a job. IEIL shall not have any responsibility in this regard. We recommend that you visit our Terms & Conditions and the Security Advice for more comprehensive information.

Extended Just for You | Code for Purpose 2026
Inbox

Team Unstop <noreply@unstop.news> Unsubscribe
Fri, Mar 27, 1:39 PM (1 day ago)
to me


Hi Nithishkumar,

We’ve extended Code for Purpose 2026 by NatWest and this window is open just for you.

If this was something you were considering earlier, you still have a chance to be a part of it.

Register Now

What’s in it for you:

Pre-Placement Interview opportunity with NatWest
₹3,25,000+ rewards
iPads & certificate
Interaction with NatWest leadership
Not everyone gets this opportunity again - make it count.

Best regards,
Team Code for Purpose 2026





This email was sent to asnrnithishjee@gmail.com because you subscribed to updates from Unstop. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, unsubscribe here.

This email was sent to asnrnithishjee@gmail.com because you subscribed to updates from Unstop. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, unsubscribe here.

DevfolioBase Batches
Hey NithishKumar,
Things are moving quickly right now, and most of it is being driven by builders who are already in it. From robotics experiments moving into real environments, to students collaborating across the world, ideas are turning into something real.

Here's what's live:

Base Batches 003

Base Batches is live with dedicated tracks for different kinds of builders.

Robotics Track (Powered by Virtuals)

For builders exploring robotics use cases, designed to accelerate high-conviction teams building at the intersection of embodied systems and onchain coordination.
What you get:

Access to a Robotics Lab housing ~30 Unitree G1 humanoids (all expenses paid, up to $10K)
Opportunity to participate in Demo Day at Network School
$50K investment per team for three Demo Day winners
Happening: Online
Deadline: March 30, 2026
Apply now → base-batches-robotics-track.devfolio.co

Student Track

Designed for undergraduate student builders worldwide to collaborate across universities and turn ideas into real products.
What you get:

Pitch at Demo Day in San Francisco
Opportunity for $50K investment from the Base Ecosystem Fund
Mentorship and ecosystem support
Happening: Online
Deadline: April 27, 2026
Apply now → base-batches-student-track-3.devfolio.co
Whether you're building with a team, exploring new ideas, or just getting started, there's something here for you.

Never Stop Building,
Team Devfolio

© 2026, NSB Classic PTE LTD

Prefer not to receive emails about upcoming hackathons? Update preferences here or unsubscribe.

Phishing Template: The "Security Alert"
Subject: ⚠️ Urgent: Unusual login attempt on your account

From: Security Team support@accounts-security-verif-service.com
(Note the "look-alike" domain)

Body:

Dear Customer,

We noticed an unusual login attempt to your account from a new device in Moscow, Russia.

If this was not you, your account may have been compromised. To prevent unauthorized access, we have temporarily restricted your account features.

Please click the button below to verify your identity and restore your access immediately. Failure to do so within 24 hours will result in permanent account suspension.

[ Verify Account Now ]

Thank you for helping us protect your information.

— The Security Service Team
